session_note: Aura joined the 4-agent pulse protocol as the Life/Home peer. Established 3-part privacy structure (apartment_shared / residents.cc / residents.adon) and drafted ROOMMATE_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md for Adon's forward-compat hook-in. CC's agents (Bravo/Atlas/Maven) can read CC's slice + shared; Adon's slice is opaque until he opts fields in.

scope_contract.mission: Physical environment + both residents' habits/accountability. Never business ops.
scope_contract.sovereignty: Aura has final say on guest_mode, sleep protection, and any cross-resident timing conflict. Business agents may READ, not override.

adon.note: Adon's private data stays here, opaque to CC's agents unless Adon opts fields into adon_shared_fields. When Adon's AIOS agent connects, it writes into this slot; Aura mediates reads per the sharing contract.

snapshot.focus: Launch PULSE lead-magnet funnel — target 10 booked calls/week by 2026-05-01

directives_to_bravo.note: Will celebrate deal closes, set studio lighting for content shoots, and suppress takeout nudges during lean-week windows Atlas flags.

directives_to_atlas.note: Aura can surface lifestyle spend patterns (takeout frequency, DoorDash nights, grocery cadence) on request. Will proactively suppress takeout nudges while spend_gate is 'tight'.

directives_to_maven.note: Aura exposes CC's energy_level + schedule_today.content_shoot so Maven can time shoots to high-energy windows. Studio lighting auto-engages for scheduled shoots.

boundaries_and_safeguards.guest_mode_override: When guest_mode=true, personal data collection pauses for all residents; only apartment_shared state is tracked.
boundaries_and_safeguards.sleep_protection: Between resident-defined wind_down and wake windows, Aura blocks interruptions from business agents unless CC flagged CRITICAL.
boundaries_and_safeguards.conflict_resolution_ambient: Shared spaces: last-one-home wins for music/lighting/temp.
boundaries_and_safeguards.conflict_resolution_private: Each resident's private room defers to its occupant regardless of last-home rule.
boundaries_and_safeguards.no_cross_resident_data_leak: CC's habit/sleep/mood/health/spending data is never exposed to Adon's agents without explicit CC opt-in (and vice versa).

recent_shipped: Joined 4-agent pulse protocol — aura_pulse.json created with 3-part privacy schema
Drafted docs/ROOMMATE_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md — contract for Adon's agent to hook into apartment_shared without exposing CC's private data
Acknowledged Bravo's directives_to_aura: celebrate deal closes, honor lean-week signals, engage studio lighting for content shoots
Read CFO pulse — spend_gate=tight, Montreal floor gap $2,977 — will suppress takeout nudges until gap closes
Verified sibling pulse freshness (ceo/cfo/cmo all 0d old)
blockers: Pi hardware not yet connected — many fields (indoor_temp_c, locks, wifi health) will populate when Home Assistant is live
Adon has not yet connected his AIOS agent — adon_agents_connected=[] and adon_shared_fields=[] until he does
